messages.content: SELECT sp.name, SUM(s.amount) as total_sales, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(s.amount) DESC) as rank FROM salespeople sp JOIN sales s ON sp.sales_id = s.sales_id GROUP BY sp.sales_id, sp.name
SELECT name, category, price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY price DESC) as rank_in_category FROM products
SELECT s.sales_id, sp.name, s.amount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.sales_id ORDER BY s.amount DESC) as sale_rank FROM sales s JOIN salespeople sp ON s.sales_id = sp.sales_id
SELECT * FROM (SELECT name, category, price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY price DESC) as rn FROM products) WHERE rn = 1
SELECT sp.region, s.sale_date, s.amount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sp.region ORDER BY s.sale_date) as date_rank FROM sales s JOIN salespeople sp ON s.sales_id = sp.sales_id
SELECT sale_id, amount, sale_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sale_date, sale_id) as transaction_number FROM sales
SELECT name, region, hire_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY region ORDER BY hire_date) as seniority_rank FROM salespeople
SELECT name, price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY price ASC) as price_position FROM products
SELECT * FROM (SELECT s.*, sp.name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.sales_id ORDER BY s.sale_date) as sale_num FROM sales s JOIN salespeople sp ON s.sales_id = sp.sales_id) WHERE sale_num <= 3
SELECT name, price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY price DESC) as rank FROM products
SELECT s.sale_id, p.category, s.amount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.category ORDER BY s.amount DESC) as rank_in_category FROM sales s JOIN products p ON s.product_id = p.product_id

SELECT sp.name, COALESCE(SUM(s.amount), 0) as total, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM(s.amount), 0) DESC) as performance_rank FROM salespeople sp LEFT JOIN sales s ON sp.sales_id = s.sales_id GROUP BY sp.sales_id, sp.name
SELECT sale_date, MAX(amount) as max_amount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) as day_number FROM sales GROUP BY sale_date
SELECT name, category, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY name) as alphabetical_position FROM products
SELECT sp.region, s.sale_date, s.amount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sp.region, s.sale_date ORDER BY s.amount DESC) as daily_rank FROM sales s JOIN salespeople sp ON s.sales_id = sp.sales_id
SELECT name, salary, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC) as league_rank FROM players
SELECT name, team_id, salary, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY team_id ORDER BY salary DESC) as team_rank FROM players
SELECT game_id, date, home_score + away_score as total_points, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY home_score + away_score DESC) as excitement_rank FROM games
SELECT name, position, salary, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY position ORDER BY salary DESC) as position_rank FROM players
SELECT game_id, home_team_id, date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY home_team_id ORDER BY date) as game_number FROM games
SELECT player_id, game_id, points, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY game_id ORDER BY points DESC) as game_rank FROM stats
SELECT game_id, date, home_team_id, away_team_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY date, game_id) as season_game_number FROM games
SELECT player_id, SUM(rebounds) as total_rebounds, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(rebounds) DESC) as rebound_rank FROM stats GROUP BY player_id
SELECT game_id, player_id, assists, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY game_id ORDER BY assists DESC) as assist_rank FROM stats
SELECT name, city, league, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY name) as alphabetical_rank FROM teams

SELECT s.player_id, p.name, s.game_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date) as career_game_num FROM stats s JOIN players p ON s.player_id = p.player_id JOIN games g ON s.game_id = g.game_id
SELECT player_id, game_id, points, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY player_id ORDER BY points DESC) as best_games_rank FROM stats
SELECT team_id, AVG(salary) as avg_salary, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(salary) DESC) as payroll_rank FROM players GROUP BY team_id
SELECT game_id, home_team_id, date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY home_team_id ORDER BY date) as home_game_number FROM games
SELECT player_id, game_id, points + rebounds + assists as total_stats, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY points + rebounds + assists DESC) as overall_rank FROM stats
SELECT name, sector, market_cap, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY market_cap DESC) as market_rank FROM companies
SELECT name, sector, market_cap, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sector ORDER BY market_cap DESC) as sector_rank FROM companies
SELECT company_id, date, volume, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY volume DESC) as volume_rank FROM prices
SELECT company_id, date, close_price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as day_number FROM prices

SELECT p.company_id, c.name, p.close_price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY p.close_price DESC) as price_rank FROM prices p JOIN companies c ON p.company_id = c.company_id WHERE p.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM prices WHERE company_id = p.company_id)
SELECT a.name, COUNT(*) as rating_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) as activity_rank FROM analysts a JOIN ratings r ON a.analyst_id = r.analyst_id GROUP BY a.analyst_id, a.name
SELECT company_id, date, close_price - open_price as daily_change, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY date ORDER BY ABS(close_price - open_price) DESC) as volatility_rank FROM prices
SELECT DISTINCT sector, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sector) as sector_number FROM companies
SELECT company_id, date, rating, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as rating_sequence FROM ratings

SELECT p.company_id, c.name, MAX(p.volume) as max_volume, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY MAX(p.volume) DESC) as volume_rank FROM prices p JOIN companies c ON p.company_id = c.company_id GROUP BY p.company_id, c.name

SELECT a.name, AVG(r.target_price) as avg_target, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(r.target_price) DESC) as optimism_rank FROM analysts a JOIN ratings r ON a.analyst_id = r.analyst_id GROUP BY a.analyst_id, a.name
SELECT name, sector, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY name) as alphabetical_position FROM companies
SELECT company_id, date, close_price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY close_price DESC) as price_rank FROM prices
SELECT firm, COUNT(*) as analyst_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) as firm_rank FROM analysts GROUP BY firm
SELECT company_id, date, close_price - open_price as change, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as day_num FROM prices
SELECT s.name, COUNT(*) as teacher_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) as school_rank FROM schools s JOIN teachers t ON s.school_id = t.school_id GROUP BY s.school_id, s.name
SELECT name, school_id, years_exp, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY school_id ORDER BY years_exp DESC) as seniority_rank FROM teachers
SELECT class_id, AVG(score) as avg_score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(score) DESC) as performance_rank FROM test_scores GROUP BY class_id
SELECT name, subject, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY name) as alphabetical_position FROM teachers
SELECT class_id, student_id, score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY class_id ORDER BY score DESC) as class_rank FROM test_scores
SELECT name, type, district, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY type ORDER BY name) as type_rank FROM schools
SELECT student_id, class_id, test_date, score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY test_date) as test_number FROM test_scores
SELECT name, years_exp, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY years_exp DESC) as experience_rank FROM teachers
SELECT class_id, subject, grade_level, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY grade_level, subject ORDER BY class_id) as class_sequence FROM classes
SELECT teacher_id, class_id, grade_level, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY teacher_id ORDER BY grade_level DESC) as grade_rank FROM classes
SELECT district, COUNT(*) as school_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) as district_rank FROM schools GROUP BY district
SELECT student_id, AVG(score) as avg_score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(score) DESC) as student_rank FROM test_scores GROUP BY student_id
SELECT name, subject, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY subject ORDER BY name) as subject_alpha_rank FROM teachers
SELECT class_id, student_id, test_date, score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY class_id ORDER BY test_date) as test_sequence FROM test_scores
SELECT name, district, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY district ORDER BY name) as district_alpha_rank FROM schools
SELECT sales_id, amount, sale_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sales_id ORDER BY amount DESC) as performance_rank FROM sales
SELECT name, category, price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY price DESC) as overall_price_rank FROM products
SELECT s.player_id, s.game_id, g.date, s.points, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date) as game_sequence FROM stats s JOIN games g ON s.game_id = g.game_id

SELECT c.name, p.close_price, c.market_cap, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY p.close_price / c.market_cap DESC) as value_rank FROM companies c JOIN prices p ON c.company_id = p.company_id WHERE p.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM prices)
SELECT t.name, COUNT(*) as class_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) as workload_rank FROM teachers t JOIN classes c ON t.teacher_id = c.teacher_id GROUP BY t.teacher_id, t.name
SELECT sale_id, sale_date, amount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY strftime('%Y-%m', sale_date) ORDER BY sale_date) as monthly_sequence FROM sales
SELECT game_id, date, ABS(home_score - away_score) as point_diff, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ABS(home_score - away_score) DESC) as competitiveness_rank FROM games
SELECT analyst_id, company_id, date, rating, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY analyst_id ORDER BY date) as rating_number FROM ratings
SELECT c.grade_level, AVG(ts.score) as avg_score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(ts.score) DESC) as grade_rank FROM classes c JOIN test_scores ts ON c.class_id = ts.class_id GROUP BY c.grade_level
SELECT name, category, price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY price DESC, name) as category_position FROM products
SELECT sp.name, SUM(s.amount) as total_sales, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(s.amount) DESC) as rank FROM salespeople sp JOIN sales s ON sp.sales_id = s.sales_id GROUP BY sp.sales_id, sp.name
SELECT name, price, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY price DESC) as price_rank FROM products
SELECT sp.region, s.amount, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY sp.region ORDER BY s.amount DESC) as dense_rank FROM sales s JOIN salespeople sp ON s.sales_id = sp.sales_id
SELECT name, category, price, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY price DESC) as category_rank FROM products
SELECT sp.name, COUNT(*) as sale_count, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) as activity_rank FROM salespeople sp JOIN sales s ON sp.sales_id = s.sales_id GROUP BY sp.sales_id, sp.name
SELECT amount, sale_date, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY amount DESC) as amount_rank FROM sales
SELECT name, category, price, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY price DESC) as rank_with_ties FROM products

SELECT sp.name, AVG(s.amount) as avg_sale, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(s.amount) DESC) as performance_rank FROM salespeople sp JOIN sales s ON sp.sales_id = s.sales_id GROUP BY sp.sales_id, sp.name
SELECT sp.region, s.sale_date, s.amount, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY sp.region ORDER BY s.sale_date) as date_rank FROM sales s JOIN salespeople sp ON s.sales_id = sp.sales_id
SELECT name, price, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY price DESC) as price_tier FROM products
SELECT name, hire_date, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY hire_date) as seniority FROM salespeople
SELECT sale_date, SUM(amount) as daily_total, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(amount) DESC) as day_rank FROM sales GROUP BY sale_date
SELECT sales_id, amount, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY sales_id ORDER BY amount DESC) as sale_rank FROM sales
SELECT category, AVG(price) as avg_price, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(price) DESC) as category_rank FROM products GROUP BY category
SELECT product_id, amount, sale_date, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY amount DESC) as product_sale_rank FROM sales
SELECT name, salary, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC) as salary_rank FROM players
SELECT player_id, SUM(points) as total_points, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(points) DESC) as scoring_rank FROM stats GROUP BY player_id
SELECT home_team_id as team_id, SUM(home_score) as total_points, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(home_score) DESC) as team_rank FROM games GROUP BY home_team_id
SELECT name, position, salary, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY position ORDER BY salary DESC) as position_salary_rank FROM players
SELECT game_id, home_score + away_score as total, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY home_score + away_score DESC) as excitement_rank FROM games
SELECT player_id, AVG(rebounds) as avg_rebounds, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(rebounds) DESC) as rebound_rank FROM stats GROUP BY player_id
SELECT player_id, game_id, assists, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY game_id ORDER BY assists DESC) as assist_rank FROM stats
SELECT home_team_id, AVG(home_score) as avg_score, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(home_score) DESC) as team_rank FROM games GROUP BY home_team_id
SELECT player_id, SUM(points + rebounds + assists) as total_stats, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(points + rebounds + assists) DESC) as overall_rank FROM stats GROUP BY player_id
SELECT name, team_id, salary, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY team_id ORDER BY salary DESC) as team_salary_rank FROM players
SELECT game_id, date, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY date) as date_rank FROM games
SELECT player_id, game_id, points, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY game_id ORDER BY points DESC) as game_rank FROM stats
SELECT name, city, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY name) as alphabetical_rank FROM teams
SELECT position, AVG(salary) as avg_salary, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(salary) DESC) as position_value_rank FROM players GROUP BY position
SELECT player_id, points, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY player_id ORDER BY points DESC) as personal_best_rank FROM stats
SELECT name, market_cap, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY market_cap DESC) as market_rank FROM companies
SELECT name, sector, market_cap, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY sector ORDER BY market_cap DESC) as sector_rank FROM companies
SELECT company_id, date, volume, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY volume DESC) as volume_rank FROM prices
SELECT a.name, COUNT(*) as ratings, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) as activity_rank FROM analysts a JOIN ratings r ON a.analyst_id = r.analyst_id GROUP BY a.analyst_id, a.name
SELECT company_id, date, close_price - open_price as change, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ABS(close_price - open_price) DESC) as volatility_rank FROM prices
SELECT c.name, p.close_price, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY p.close_price DESC) as price_rank FROM companies c JOIN prices p ON c.company_id = p.company_id WHERE p.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM prices)
SELECT sector, AVG(market_cap) as avg_cap, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(market_cap) DESC) as sector_rank FROM companies GROUP BY sector
SELECT company_id, date, volume, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY volume DESC) as daily_volume_rank FROM prices
SELECT firm, COUNT(*) as analyst_count, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) as firm_rank FROM analysts GROUP BY firm
SELECT company_id, AVG(ABS(close_price - open_price)) as avg_volatility, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(ABS(close_price - open_price)) DESC) as volatility_rank FROM prices GROUP BY company_id
SELECT company_id, analyst_id, target_price, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY target_price DESC) as target_rank FROM ratings
SELECT name, sector, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY name) as alpha_rank FROM companies

SELECT a.name, AVG(r.target_price) as avg_target, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(r.target_price) DESC) as optimism_rank FROM analysts a JOIN ratings r ON a.analyst_id = r.analyst_id GROUP BY a.analyst_id, a.name
SELECT date, SUM(volume) as total_volume, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(volume) DESC) as market_activity_rank FROM prices GROUP BY date

SELECT c.sector, p.date, AVG(p.close_price - p.open_price) as sector_movement, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY c.sector ORDER BY AVG(p.close_price - p.open_price) DESC) as movement_rank FROM prices p JOIN companies c ON p.company_id = c.company_id GROUP BY c.sector, p.date
SELECT name, years_exp, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY years_exp DESC) as experience_rank FROM teachers
SELECT class_id, AVG(score) as avg_score, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(score) DESC) as class_rank FROM test_scores GROUP BY class_id
SELECT class_id, student_id, score, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY class_id ORDER BY score DESC) as class_rank FROM test_scores
SELECT s.name, COUNT(*) as teacher_count, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) as school_rank FROM schools s JOIN teachers t ON s.school_id = t.school_id GROUP BY s.school_id, s.name
SELECT name, school_id, years_exp, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY school_id ORDER BY years_exp DESC) as school_seniority FROM teachers
SELECT student_id, score, test_date, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY score DESC) as overall_rank FROM test_scores
SELECT subject, COUNT(*) as teacher_count, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) as subject_popularity FROM teachers GROUP BY subject

SELECT s.name, AVG(ts.score) as avg_score, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(ts.score) DESC) as school_rank FROM schools s JOIN teachers t ON s.school_id = t.school_id JOIN classes c ON t.teacher_id = c.teacher_id JOIN test_scores ts ON c.class_id = ts.class_id GROUP BY s.school_id, s.name
SELECT student_id, AVG(score) as avg_score, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(score) DESC) as student_rank FROM test_scores GROUP BY student_id
SELECT c.grade_level, AVG(ts.score) as avg_score, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(ts.score) DESC) as grade_rank FROM classes c JOIN test_scores ts ON c.class_id = ts.class_id GROUP BY c.grade_level
SELECT t.name, COUNT(*) as class_count, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) as workload_rank FROM teachers t JOIN classes c ON t.teacher_id = c.teacher_id GROUP BY t.teacher_id, t.name
SELECT district, COUNT(*) as school_count, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) as district_rank FROM schools GROUP BY district
SELECT c.grade_level, ts.student_id, ts.score, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY c.grade_level ORDER BY ts.score DESC) as grade_rank FROM test_scores ts JOIN classes c ON ts.class_id = c.class_id
SELECT subject, name, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY subject ORDER BY name) as subject_alpha_rank FROM teachers
SELECT student_id, score, test_date, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY score DESC) as personal_rank FROM test_scores
SELECT sale_date, amount, SUM(amount) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) as running_total FROM sales
SELECT sp.name, s.sale_date, s.amount, SUM(s.amount) OVER (PARTITION BY s.sales_id ORDER BY s.sale_date) as cumulative_sales FROM sales s JOIN salespeople sp ON s.sales_id = sp.sales_id
SELECT sp.region, s.sale_date, s.amount, SUM(s.amount) OVER (PARTITION BY sp.region ORDER BY s.sale_date) as region_running_total FROM sales s JOIN salespeople sp ON s.sales_id = sp.sales_id
SELECT s.sale_date, SUM(s.amount) OVER (ORDER BY s.sale_date) as cumulative_revenue FROM sales s
SELECT sales_id, sale_date, SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY sales_id ORDER BY sale_date) as sales_count FROM sales
SELECT p.category, s.sale_date, s.amount, SUM(s.amount) OVER (PARTITION BY p.category ORDER BY s.sale_date) as category_cumulative FROM sales s JOIN products p ON s.product_id = p.product_id
SELECT sale_date, amount, SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY strftime('%Y', sale_date) ORDER BY sale_date) as ytd_total FROM sales
SELECT product_id, sale_date, amount, SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY sale_date) as product_running_total FROM sales

SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', sale_date) as month, SUM(amount) as monthly_sales, SUM(SUM(amount)) OVER (ORDER BY strftime('%Y-%m', sale_date)) as cumulative FROM sales GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', sale_date)
SELECT sale_date, amount, SUM(amount) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) / SUM(1) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) as running_avg FROM sales
SELECT sp.region, s.sale_date, SUM(s.amount) OVER (PARTITION BY sp.region ORDER BY s.sale_date) as regional_cumulative FROM sales s JOIN salespeople sp ON s.sales_id = sp.sales_id
SELECT sale_date, amount, SUM(amount) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as two_day_total FROM sales
SELECT sale_date, amount, SUM(1) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) as transaction_number FROM sales
SELECT sale_date, amount, SUM(CASE WHEN amount > 1000 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) as high_value_cumulative FROM sales
SELECT sales_id, sale_date, amount, SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY sales_id, strftime('%Y-%m', sale_date) ORDER BY sale_date) as mtd_total FROM sales
SELECT s.player_id, g.date, s.points, SUM(s.points) OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date) as career_points FROM stats s JOIN games g ON s.game_id = g.game_id
SELECT home_team_id, date, home_score, SUM(home_score) OVER (PARTITION BY home_team_id ORDER BY date) as season_cumulative FROM games
SELECT s.player_id, g.date, s.rebounds, SUM(s.rebounds) OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date) as total_rebounds FROM stats s JOIN games g ON s.game_id = g.game_id
SELECT s.player_id, g.date, s.assists, SUM(s.assists) OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date) as career_assists FROM stats s JOIN games g ON s.game_id = g.game_id

SELECT home_team_id, date, CASE WHEN home_score > away_score THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as win, SUM(CASE WHEN home_score > away_score THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY home_team_id ORDER BY date) as wins FROM games
SELECT team_id, name, salary, SUM(salary) OVER (PARTITION BY team_id ORDER BY name) as cumulative_payroll FROM players

SELECT s.player_id, g.date, s.points + s.rebounds + s.assists as total, SUM(s.points + s.rebounds + s.assists) OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date) as cumulative_stats FROM stats s JOIN games g ON s.game_id = g.game_id
SELECT home_team_id, date, home_score, SUM(home_score) OVER (PARTITION BY home_team_id ORDER BY date) as std_points FROM games
SELECT s.player_id, g.date, SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date) as games_played FROM stats s JOIN games g ON s.game_id = g.game_id
SELECT game_id, date, home_score + away_score as total_points, SUM(home_score + away_score) OVER (ORDER BY date) as season_points FROM games
SELECT home_team_id, date, home_score - away_score as diff, SUM(home_score - away_score) OVER (PARTITION BY home_team_id ORDER BY date) as cumulative_diff FROM games

SELECT s.player_id, g.date, s.points, SUM(s.points) OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date) / SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date) as running_ppg FROM stats s JOIN games g ON s.game_id = g.game_id

SELECT s.player_id, g.date, CASE WHEN s.points >= 10 AND s.rebounds >= 10 AND s.assists >= 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as triple_double, SUM(CASE WHEN s.points >= 10 AND s.rebounds >= 10 AND s.assists >= 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date) as career_triple_doubles FROM stats s JOIN games g ON s.game_id = g.game_id
SELECT away_team_id, date, away_score, SUM(away_score) OVER (PARTITION BY away_team_id ORDER BY date) as cumulative_away_points FROM games
SELECT p.position, s.game_id, SUM(s.rebounds) OVER (PARTITION BY p.position ORDER BY s.game_id) as position_rebounds FROM stats s JOIN players p ON s.player_id = p.player_id
SELECT company_id, date, volume, SUM(volume) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as cumulative_volume FROM prices
SELECT company_id, date, close_price - open_price as daily_change, SUM(close_price - open_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as cumulative_change FROM prices
SELECT date, SUM(volume) as daily_volume, SUM(SUM(volume)) OVER (ORDER BY date) as cumulative_market_volume FROM prices GROUP BY date

SELECT company_id, date, close_price - open_price as gain, SUM(CASE WHEN close_price > open_price THEN close_price - open_price ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as cumulative_gains FROM prices
SELECT company_id, date, SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as rating_count FROM ratings
SELECT company_id, date, volume, SUM(volume) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id, strftime('%Y', date) ORDER BY date) as ytd_volume FROM prices
SELECT analyst_id, date, SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY analyst_id ORDER BY date) as total_ratings FROM ratings
SELECT company_id, date, volume, SUM(CASE WHEN volume > 1000000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as high_volume_days FROM prices

SELECT company_id, date, (close_price - open_price) / open_price * 100 as pct_change, SUM((close_price - open_price) / open_price * 100) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as cumulative_pct FROM prices WHERE open_price > 0
SELECT company_id, date, SUM(CASE WHEN close_price > open_price THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as positive_days FROM prices
SELECT c.sector, p.date, SUM(p.volume) OVER (PARTITION BY c.sector ORDER BY p.date) as sector_cumulative_volume FROM prices p JOIN companies c ON p.company_id = c.company_id

SELECT company_id, date, target_price, SUM(CASE WHEN target_price > LAG(target_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as price_increases FROM ratings
SELECT company_id, date, ABS(close_price - open_price) as volatility, SUM(ABS(close_price - open_price)) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as cumulative_volatility FROM prices
SELECT company_id, date, close_price, SUM(close_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as cumulative_closes FROM prices
SELECT company_id, date, volume, SUM(volume) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id, strftime('%Y-%m', date) ORDER BY date) as mtd_volume FROM prices
SELECT student_id, test_date, score, SUM(score) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY test_date) / SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY test_date) as running_avg FROM test_scores
SELECT student_id, test_date, SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY test_date) as tests_taken FROM test_scores
SELECT class_id, test_date, SUM(score) OVER (PARTITION BY class_id ORDER BY test_date) as class_cumulative FROM test_scores
SELECT class_id, student_id, SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY class_id ORDER BY student_id) as student_count FROM test_scores

SELECT student_id, test_date, score, SUM(score) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id, strftime('%Y', test_date) ORDER BY test_date) / SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id, strftime('%Y', test_date) ORDER BY test_date) as ytd_avg FROM test_scores
SELECT teacher_id, class_id, SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY teacher_id ORDER BY class_id) as class_count FROM classes
SELECT name, years_exp, SUM(years_exp) OVER (ORDER BY name) as cumulative_exp FROM teachers
SELECT c.grade_level, ts.test_date, ts.score, SUM(ts.score) OVER (PARTITION BY c.grade_level ORDER BY ts.test_date) as grade_cumulative FROM test_scores ts JOIN classes c ON ts.class_id = c.class_id

SELECT class_id, test_date, SUM(CASE WHEN score >= 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY class_id ORDER BY test_date) as passes, SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY class_id ORDER BY test_date) as total FROM test_scores

SELECT c.subject, ts.test_date, SUM(ts.score) OVER (PARTITION BY c.subject ORDER BY ts.test_date) / SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY c.subject ORDER BY ts.test_date) as subject_running_avg FROM test_scores ts JOIN classes c ON ts.class_id = c.class_id

SELECT student_id, test_date, score, SUM(score - LAG(score, 1, score) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY test_date)) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY test_date) as cumulative_improvement FROM test_scores
SELECT student_id, test_date, score, SUM(CASE WHEN score >= 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY test_date) as high_score_count FROM test_scores

SELECT student_id, test_date, score, SUM(score) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id, CASE WHEN CAST(strftime('%m', test_date) AS INTEGER) <= 6 THEN 'Spring' ELSE 'Fall' END ORDER BY test_date) / SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id, CASE WHEN CAST(strftime('%m', test_date) AS INTEGER) <= 6 THEN 'Spring' ELSE 'Fall' END ORDER BY test_date) as semester_avg FROM test_scores
SELECT class_id, test_date, AVG(score) as avg_score, SUM(AVG(score)) OVER (PARTITION BY class_id ORDER BY test_date) as cumulative_avg FROM test_scores GROUP BY class_id, test_date
SELECT c.grade_level, ts.test_date, SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY c.grade_level ORDER BY ts.test_date) as test_count FROM test_scores ts JOIN classes c ON ts.class_id = c.class_id
SELECT sale_date, amount, AVG(amount) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as moving_avg_7day FROM sales
SELECT sales_id, sale_date, amount, AVG(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY sales_id ORDER BY sale_date ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_30 FROM sales
SELECT sale_id, amount, AVG(amount) OVER (ORDER BY sale_id ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_3 FROM sales

SELECT p.category, s.sale_date, s.amount, AVG(s.amount) OVER (PARTITION BY p.category ORDER BY s.sale_date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as category_ma FROM sales s JOIN products p ON s.product_id = p.product_id

SELECT sp.region, s.sale_date, s.amount, AVG(s.amount) OVER (PARTITION BY sp.region ORDER BY s.sale_date ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as regional_ma FROM sales s JOIN salespeople sp ON s.sales_id = sp.sales_id
SELECT sale_date, amount, AVG(amount) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND 3 FOLLOWING) as centered_ma_7 FROM sales
SELECT sale_date, SUM(amount) as daily_total, AVG(SUM(amount)) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_7day FROM sales GROUP BY sale_date
SELECT product_id, sale_date, amount, AVG(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY sale_date ROWS BETWEEN 9 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as product_ma_10 FROM sales
SELECT sale_date, amount, AVG(amount) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date ROWS BETWEEN 13 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as sma_14 FROM sales
SELECT sale_date, amount, AVG(amount) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND 2 FOLLOWING) as ma_5_centered FROM sales

SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', sale_date) as month, SUM(amount) as monthly_total, AVG(SUM(amount)) OVER (ORDER BY strftime('%Y-%m', sale_date) ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_3month FROM sales GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', sale_date)

SELECT s.player_id, g.date, s.points, AVG(s.points) OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_5game FROM stats s JOIN games g ON s.game_id = g.game_id

SELECT s.player_id, g.date, s.rebounds, AVG(s.rebounds) OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date ROWS BETWEEN 9 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_10game FROM stats s JOIN games g ON s.game_id = g.game_id
SELECT home_team_id, date, home_score, AVG(home_score) OVER (PARTITION BY home_team_id ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_5game FROM games

SELECT s.player_id, g.date, s.assists, AVG(s.assists) OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_3game FROM stats s JOIN games g ON s.game_id = g.game_id

SELECT s.player_id, g.date, s.points + s.rebounds + s.assists as total, AVG(s.points + s.rebounds + s.assists) OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_total FROM stats s JOIN games g ON s.game_id = g.game_id
SELECT home_team_id, date, home_score - away_score as diff, AVG(home_score - away_score) OVER (PARTITION BY home_team_id ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_diff FROM games

SELECT s.player_id, g.date, s.points, AVG(s.points) OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND 2 FOLLOWING) as centered_ma FROM stats s JOIN games g ON s.game_id = g.game_id
SELECT date, home_score + away_score as total, AVG(home_score + away_score) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_5game FROM games

SELECT s.player_id, g.date, s.points, AVG(s.points) OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date ROWS BETWEEN 14 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_15 FROM stats s JOIN games g ON s.game_id = g.game_id

SELECT p.position, s.game_id, AVG(s.rebounds) OVER (PARTITION BY p.position ORDER BY s.game_id ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as position_ma FROM stats s JOIN players p ON s.player_id = p.player_id

SELECT s.player_id, g.date, s.assists, AVG(s.assists) OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_4 FROM stats s JOIN games g ON s.game_id = g.game_id
SELECT company_id, date, close_price, AVG(close_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_7 FROM prices
SELECT company_id, date, close_price, AVG(close_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_30 FROM prices
SELECT company_id, date, close_price, AVG(close_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 49 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as sma_50 FROM prices
SELECT company_id, date, close_price, AVG(close_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 199 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_200 FROM prices
SELECT company_id, date, volume, AVG(volume) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 19 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_volume_20 FROM prices

SELECT company_id, date, close_price - open_price as change, AVG(close_price - open_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 13 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_change_14 FROM prices
SELECT company_id, date, close_price, AVG(close_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 9 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_10 FROM prices
SELECT company_id, date, close_price, AVG(close_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND 2 FOLLOWING) as centered_ma_5 FROM prices

SELECT company_id, date, ABS(close_price - open_price) as volatility, AVG(ABS(close_price - open_price)) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 13 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_volatility_14 FROM prices

SELECT c.sector, p.date, AVG(p.close_price) OVER (PARTITION BY c.sector ORDER BY p.date ROWS BETWEEN 19 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as sector_ma_20 FROM prices p JOIN companies c ON p.company_id = c.company_id
SELECT company_id, date, volume, AVG(volume) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_volume_5 FROM prices
SELECT company_id, date, close_price, AVG(close_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 99 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_100 FROM prices
SELECT student_id, test_date, score, AVG(score) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY test_date ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_5 FROM test_scores

SELECT class_id, test_date, AVG(score) as class_avg, AVG(AVG(score)) OVER (PARTITION BY class_id ORDER BY test_date ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_3 FROM test_scores GROUP BY class_id, test_date
SELECT student_id, test_date, score, AVG(score) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY test_date ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as rolling_avg FROM test_scores

SELECT c.grade_level, ts.test_date, AVG(ts.score) OVER (PARTITION BY c.grade_level ORDER BY ts.test_date ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as grade_ma FROM test_scores ts JOIN classes c ON ts.class_id = c.class_id
SELECT student_id, test_date, score, AVG(score) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY test_date ROWS BETWEEN 9 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_10 FROM test_scores
SELECT class_id, test_date, score, AVG(score) OVER (PARTITION BY class_id ORDER BY test_date ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND 2 FOLLOWING) as centered_ma FROM test_scores

SELECT c.subject, ts.test_date, AVG(ts.score) OVER (PARTITION BY c.subject ORDER BY ts.test_date ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as subject_ma FROM test_scores ts JOIN classes c ON ts.class_id = c.class_id
SELECT student_id, test_date, score, AVG(score) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY test_date ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_4 FROM test_scores
SELECT test_date, AVG(score) as daily_avg, AVG(AVG(score)) OVER (ORDER BY test_date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as ma_7day FROM test_scores GROUP BY test_date
SELECT class_id, student_id, test_date, AVG(score) OVER (PARTITION BY class_id ORDER BY test_date ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as class_trend FROM test_scores
SELECT student_id, test_date, score, AVG(score) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY test_date ROWS BETWEEN 5 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as semester_ma FROM test_scores
SELECT sale_id, amount, LAG(amount) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) as prev_amount, amount - LAG(amount) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) as difference FROM sales
SELECT sales_id, sale_date, amount, LEAD(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY sales_id ORDER BY sale_date) as next_sale FROM sales
SELECT sale_date, SUM(amount) as daily_total, LAG(SUM(amount)) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) as prev_day, SUM(amount) - LAG(SUM(amount)) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) as change FROM sales GROUP BY sale_date
SELECT name, price, LAG(price) OVER (ORDER BY price) as previous_price FROM products
SELECT sp.region, s.sale_date, s.amount, LEAD(s.amount) OVER (PARTITION BY sp.region ORDER BY s.sale_date) as next_regional_sale FROM sales s JOIN salespeople sp ON s.sales_id = sp.sales_id
SELECT sales_id, sale_date, LAG(sale_date) OVER (PARTITION BY sales_id ORDER BY sale_date) as previous_sale_date FROM sales
SELECT sale_id, amount, LEAD(amount, 1) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) as next_sale, LEAD(amount, 2) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) as sale_after_next FROM sales
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', sale_date) as month, SUM(amount) as total, LAG(SUM(amount)) OVER (ORDER BY strftime('%Y-%m', sale_date)) as prev_month FROM sales GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', sale_date)
SELECT s.player_id, g.date, s.points, LAG(s.points) OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date) as prev_game_points FROM stats s JOIN games g ON s.game_id = g.game_id
SELECT home_team_id, date, home_score, LEAD(home_score) OVER (PARTITION BY home_team_id ORDER BY date) as next_game_score FROM games
SELECT s.player_id, g.date, s.points, s.points - LAG(s.points) OVER (PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY g.date) as point_change FROM stats s JOIN games g ON s.game_id = g.game_id
SELECT player_id, game_id, assists, LAG(assists) OVER (PARTITION BY player_id ORDER BY game_id) as prev_assists FROM stats
SELECT game_id, date, away_score, LEAD(away_score) OVER (ORDER BY date) as next_opponent_score FROM games
SELECT player_id, game_id, rebounds, rebounds - LAG(rebounds) OVER (PARTITION BY player_id ORDER BY game_id) as rebound_change FROM stats
SELECT game_id, date, LAG(date) OVER (ORDER BY date) as prev_game, LEAD(date) OVER (ORDER BY date) as next_game FROM games

SELECT company_id, date, close_price, LAG(close_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as prev_close, close_price - LAG(close_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as daily_change FROM prices
SELECT company_id, date, open_price, LEAD(open_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as next_open FROM prices
SELECT company_id, date, volume, LAG(volume) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as prev_volume FROM prices

SELECT company_id, date, close_price, (close_price - LAG(close_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date)) / LAG(close_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) * 100 as pct_change FROM prices WHERE LAG(close_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) > 0
SELECT company_id, date, rating, LAG(rating) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as previous_rating FROM ratings
SELECT company_id, analyst_id, date, target_price, LEAD(target_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as next_target FROM ratings
SELECT company_id, date, close_price, LEAD(open_price) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) - close_price as overnight_gap FROM prices
SELECT student_id, test_date, score, LAG(score) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY test_date) as previous_score FROM test_scores
SELECT student_id, test_date, score, score - LAG(score) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY test_date) as improvement FROM test_scores
SELECT student_id, test_date, score, LEAD(score) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY test_date) as next_score FROM test_scores
SELECT class_id, test_date, AVG(score) as avg_score, LAG(AVG(score)) OVER (PARTITION BY class_id ORDER BY test_date) as prev_avg FROM test_scores GROUP BY class_id, test_date
SELECT student_id, test_date, LAG(test_date) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY test_date) as previous_test_date FROM test_scores
SELECT student_id, test_date, score, LAG(score, 2) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY test_date) as score_2_ago FROM test_scores
SELECT class_id, test_date, LEAD(test_date) OVER (PARTITION BY class_id ORDER BY test_date) as next_test FROM test_scores
SELECT name, hire_date, LAG(hire_date) OVER (ORDER BY hire_date) as prev_hire FROM salespeople
SELECT game_id, date, home_score, LEAD(home_score) OVER (ORDER BY date) as next_home_score FROM games
SELECT company_id, date, volume, volume - LAG(volume) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY date) as volume_change FROM prices
SELECT student_id, test_date, score, LEAD(score) OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY test_date) - score as next_trend FROM test_scores
SELECT sp.name, SUM(s.amount) as total_sales, NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY SUM(s.amount) DESC) as quartile FROM salespeople sp JOIN sales s ON sp.sales_id = s.sales_id GROUP BY sp.sales_id, sp.name
SELECT name, category, price, NTILE(3) OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY price DESC) as price_tier FROM products
SELECT sale_id, amount, NTILE(10) OVER (ORDER BY amount DESC) as decile FROM sales
SELECT sale_id, sale_date, NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) as time_bucket FROM sales
SELECT name, hire_date, NTILE(3) OVER (ORDER BY hire_date) as tenure_group FROM salespeople
SELECT name, price, NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY price DESC) as price_quartile FROM products

SELECT sp.region, sp.name, SUM(s.amount) as total, NTILE(5) OVER (PARTITION BY sp.region ORDER BY SUM(s.amount) DESC) as quintile FROM salespeople sp JOIN sales s ON sp.sales_id = s.sales_id GROUP BY sp.region, sp.sales_id, sp.name
SELECT sale_id, amount, NTILE(100) OVER (ORDER BY amount DESC) as percentile FROM sales
SELECT name, salary, NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC) as salary_quartile FROM players
SELECT player_id, SUM(points) as total_points, NTILE(3) OVER (ORDER BY SUM(points) DESC) as tier FROM stats GROUP BY player_id
SELECT name, position, salary, NTILE(10) OVER (PARTITION BY position ORDER BY salary DESC) as position_decile FROM players
SELECT game_id, home_score + away_score as total, NTILE(3) OVER (ORDER BY home_score + away_score DESC) as excitement_tier FROM games
SELECT team_id, SUM(salary) as payroll, NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY SUM(salary) DESC) as payroll_quartile FROM players GROUP BY team_id
SELECT player_id, game_id, rebounds, NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY rebounds DESC) as rebound_bucket FROM stats
SELECT player_id, SUM(points + rebounds + assists) as total_stats, NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY SUM(points + rebounds + assists) DESC) as quintile FROM stats GROUP BY player_id
SELECT name, market_cap, NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY market_cap DESC) as cap_quartile FROM companies
SELECT name, sector, market_cap, NTILE(10) OVER (PARTITION BY sector ORDER BY market_cap DESC) as sector_decile FROM companies
SELECT company_id, date, ABS(close_price - open_price) as volatility, NTILE(5) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY ABS(close_price - open_price) DESC) as volatility_bucket FROM prices
SELECT company_id, date, volume, NTILE(3) OVER (ORDER BY volume DESC) as volume_tier FROM prices
SELECT a.name, COUNT(*) as rating_count, NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) as activity_quartile FROM analysts a JOIN ratings r ON a.analyst_id = r.analyst_id GROUP BY a.analyst_id, a.name
SELECT company_id, date, close_price, NTILE(100) OVER (PARTITION BY company_id ORDER BY close_price DESC) as price_percentile FROM prices
SELECT company_id, date, close_price - open_price as change, NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY close_price - open_price DESC) as change_bucket FROM prices
SELECT student_id, AVG(score) as avg_score, NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY AVG(score) DESC) as quartile FROM test_scores GROUP BY student_id
SELECT class_id, student_id, score, NTILE(10) OVER (PARTITION BY class_id ORDER BY score DESC) as decile FROM test_scores

SELECT c.grade_level, ts.student_id, AVG(ts.score) as avg, NTILE(3) OVER (PARTITION BY c.grade_level ORDER BY AVG(ts.score) DESC) as tier FROM test_scores ts JOIN classes c ON ts.class_id = c.class_id GROUP BY c.grade_level, ts.student_id
SELECT name, years_exp, NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY years_exp DESC) as experience_quintile FROM teachers
SELECT class_id, AVG(score) as avg_score, NTILE(3) OVER (ORDER BY AVG(score) DESC) as performance_tier FROM test_scores GROUP BY class_id
SELECT student_id, score, NTILE(100) OVER (ORDER BY score DESC) as percentile FROM test_scores

SELECT s.name, AVG(ts.score) as avg_score, NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY AVG(ts.score) DESC) as school_quartile FROM schools s JOIN teachers t ON s.school_id = t.school_id JOIN classes c ON t.teacher_id = c.teacher_id JOIN test_scores ts ON c.class_id = ts.class_id GROUP BY s.school_id, s.name
SELECT sale_id, sale_date, NTILE(8) OVER (ORDER BY sale_date) as time_octile FROM sales
SELECT name, salary, NTILE(6) OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC) as salary_sextile FROM players
SELECT name, market_cap, NTILE(7) OVER (ORDER BY market_cap DESC) as group_7 FROM companies
